有的一百多个G的游戏你玩了半个小时就腻了，有的几百兆的游戏你能玩一个下午不关电脑。十多年前，三两伙伴，一个机房，几台白色大头机，一碟软盘挨个塞。就能酣战一个下午。这是80后的青春，90后的童年，00后的小友。 在开始游戏时可能会遇到的以下几类问题及解决办法： 1：总是闪退（该问题常见于win10，11） 那是你输入法的问题，切换到大写然后换一下美式键盘就可以 2：自建房没人机 按h 3：调了准星大小没变化 要记得先按“提交”再确定 4：为啥有黑边 换宽屏即可 5：为啥听不到原版无线电语音包 你的默认语言可能不包含英语

Легендарная CS 1.6 своих денег не стоит, но это только пока ты не зайдешь на зомби-сервера. Игра не смотря на свой унылый и древний движок удивила меня, а я на минуточку родился в 2007. Если вы задрот, который будет играть в это по 7 часов в день, то игра особенно окупит себя. Из минусов - отсутствие ботов, а значит - нет возможности поиграть без интернета. Было приятно окунутся в атмосферу 2000-ых, ктотрую я, к сожалению, не застал.

Появился, значит, в Зоне Черный Сталкер. К лагерю ночью повадился ходить. И там сует руку в палатку и говорит: — Ввадииички папиииить, — а если не дашь хлебнуть из фляжки или наружу полезешь — пришибет! А раз мужик один решил пошутить: вылез тихо из палатки, надел кожаную перчатку, и полез к соседям в палатку. Полез, значит, и попрощайничает жалостно: — Вадииички, вадииички папить… А тут из палатки навстречу высовывается рука и за горло его… Цап! И сиплый голосок отзывается тихонько: — А тебе моя водичка зачем нужна?!

Батя всех шутер игр!) Советую всем. Когда начинал играть в нее, еще были компьютерные клубы в подвалах. С еле живыми дивайсами...  Откладывал денюжку и после занятий ходил на пару часиков играть. Прям приятная настольгия.... Плюс можете подружиться с ребятами на серверах!  Одна тоже очень приятная история их жизни! Играл я на одном сервере и все там друг друга знали. И все были адекватные, много среди них мужиков, девушек семейных было. И как то раз, было 31 декабря, один из них мне пишет, даже ник помню(Змей). Говорит: "Я сегодня буду недалеко от тебя проезжать, хочу увидеться". На что я ему скинул геолокацию. Мы с ним встретились, он вручил мне подарок на новый год!! И я тоже приготовил ему небольшой подарок. В итоге, получилось так что мы обменялись подарками не договариваясь об этом. Было очень приятно! Но потом я узнал что не очень по пути и было ему до меня ехать. Он свернул с пути и до меня еще ехал почти 300 километров! Вот это я понимаю-друзья! Вот какие отношения были в этой прекрасной игре на серверах раньше. Сейчас возможно такое тоже есть, но я стал намного реже в нее играть.

This game saved my life.  I am 27.  My ex-wife and I have a daughter together, and adopted our son together. They are now both 4 years old.  When we were going through our separation, I found myself lost and miserable. I was self destructive. I got so mad one day from everything spiraling out of my control that I punched some concrete in a moment of overwhelming emotion. That caused me to break my 5th metacarpal in my right hand... my working hand... my games hand.. the hand that I held and carried my children to bed with.. The hand I desperately needed to make sure I could continue to provide.  After learning of the severity of my self-inflicted damage, I was borderline suicidal. Keep in mind that just a few months before this, I was the happiest man with no history of depression or anxiety. I have never had fits of rage, or been one to break down and cry, but I was in a low spot that just really buried me from being able to see the light on the other side.  Having nothing better to do, I searched for a game I could play, ONE HANDED while I recovered. I somehow stumbled upon this game and read some of the reviews. I decided that it had to be worth a shot... I must admit, I didn't beat the game, or play nearly as long as some of you. In fact, I may have only played this game a day or two.. With that being said, after doing so, I had a new found joy and hope for life. I was able to put behind me the pain and suffering that had been cast over me. I was able to experience other peoples joy and happiness. I was able to see the fruits of my "labor". I relaxed for 5 ♥♥♥♥ing minutes to this music long enough to realize that I was going to be okay.  After coming to that realization, I turned the game off, and I went back to work. It hurt my hand like hell but I was motivated. I stopped feeling so damn sorry for myself, and I became the father I needed to be in that moment, not the weak boy I was behaving as.  Today, I am close friend with my kids mother. We don't fight, or argue, or say hurtful things to each other. We are parents, and friends.  I now have 3 kids. My third child is, wait for it, ALSO 4 YEARS OLD. The woman I am with was going through a very similar situation at the time of my own separation, and we just stumbled in to each others life unexpectedly. We have been in a relationship for a year now, and are very happy together.  Moral of the story, you never know what life holds in store for you, and if I would have given up when all the odds were stacked against me, I wouldn't be where I am today. This silly little game helped me realize that.  Thank you

Ultimate classic that still holds up today.  Counter-Strike (1.6) is an all-time classic and one of the first games that I owned and played on my Steam account. I even bought it boxed and with that, started my journey on Steam.  Counter-Strike is a simple, yet so fun, game. You choose a team, in which your objectives vary. You can play as terrorists or Counter-terrorists. As terrorists, you keep and defend hostages, place bombs at specific sites and prevent the counter-terrorists from defusing them. As counter-terrorists, you try to save the hostages and defuse the bombs that terrorist have placed.   Meanwhile, you pump each other full of lead. I especially liked the VIP mode, in which one player is appointed as a target that will win the round if eliminated. The other players on your team need to defend you with their lives until the time is up to win. It is a unique and fun experience that was most fun at LAN parties.  When starting the round, you choose/buy your weapons. You can choose a variety of pistols, sub-machine guns, heavy assault rifles, sniper rifles and grenades. Some weapons work better for you than others, so half the fun is trying to figure out which weapon has the right feeling and handling for you. The weapons themselves however, are well balanced and I did not experience any unfair advantages with a specific weapon.  The Graphics in Counter-Strike are really nice for the time. They are well rendered and textured, and the frame rate is spot on. No tearing, no lag, it runs smooth as butter. The animations are stiff and when killed, you drop dead as a brick, but this the charm that the game has.  In terms of sound, this game nails it, especially for the time period. Guns sound aggressive and loud, and explosions can be felt through your headset. It is spot on and holds up great with today’s standards.  The controls are easy to learn and work fluent and responsive.  My only problem at the time with Counter-Strike was the limited time to choose your gear before the round starts. It is completely logical that players do not wait until everyone choose their shiny guns, but when first playing, I was still checking what weapon would be best for me, and before I knew it, I had forty holes in me. But, like with many other First Person Shooters, especially online, I just need to git gut.    I still cherish the memories of this game at the many LAN parties I attended to, the pure joy, tension and competitive game play that had this unique experience back then. The thrill when you finally blow someone up with a well lobbed grenade, the satisfaction when you finally sent a successful sniper bullet through someone’s skull, it was just amazing. Counter-Strike will always be one of my favorite online shooters today.   The upgraded Counter-Strike: Source introduces new graphics and an even smoother experience, however, Counter-Strike (1.6) will always remain an all-time gem that can be played any time. When I am feeling old, I just play this version over the Source remake or Global Offensive, just for good old times.   Definitely recommend this timeless relic.

I am a 55 yo mother, probably one of the oldest people playing this game. I am a single mother to my Son, who is 14 now. My son got this game for Christmas in 2022 from his uncle, so we installed it on his computer and he started playing. By the end of the week he had 24 hours on this game. This was horrible for me, as it was already hard for me to find ways to spend time with my son, as he is always out with his friends or just watching YouTube. So i decided to make a Steam account and get this game to see if I could maybe play alongside him. I loaded into the game, picked my character and world and started playing but I was stuck on what you where supposed to do. I asked my Son for help and he hosted a game for me to join. I loved it as it was the best time I had spent with my Son since my husband had died. This game has ever since brought me and my son closer again and now we actually spend time together outside the house together as well. This game reminded me that there's fun to be had in everything, and it has brought both me and my Son many happy memories.

As someone who has played Counter-Strike 1.6, I can say that it is an absolute classic in the world of first-person shooters. The game has stood the test of time, and continues to be one of the most enjoyable and challenging multiplayer experiences available.  One of the things I appreciated most about the game was its simplicity. Unlike many modern shooters, Counter-Strike 1.6 keeps things straightforward and focused on the core gameplay elements that make the game so enjoyable. The controls are intuitive and easy to master, making it accessible to players of all skill levels.  The game's community is also one of its greatest strengths. Players from around the world come together to compete and cooperate, and the game's simple but effective communication tools allow players to work together effectively. This creates a sense of camaraderie and competition that is hard to find in other games.  The game also has a high level of replayability. The various game modes and maps, combined with the unpredictable nature of multiplayer gameplay, mean that no two matches are ever exactly the same. This keeps the game fresh and exciting, even after many hours of play.  Overall, I cannot recommend Counter-Strike 1.6 highly enough. Whether you're a seasoned veteran of the franchise or a newcomer to first-person shooters, this game is sure to provide you with an enjoyable and challenging experience. It truly is a classic that every gamer should experience.

Игра сама по себе не плохая, но она плохо сохранилась с точки зрения онлайна, а именно: - Нет нормальных серверов, в частности ванильных. Практически все сервера накачивают тонну плагинов и форсируют тонну ненужных тебе вещей. Зайдя на один сервер, ты не сможешь вернуть привычное расположение пушки в правом углу. А если я не киберспортсмен, которому не нравится пушка в левом углу, а? Меню теперь это поменять не может и конфиг перезаписывается. - Из-за того что все сервера не ванильные, как правило это не Counter-Strike. Всё от карт до геймплея меняется до неузнаваемости, порой до неиграбельности при наличии так называемых VIP. - Мало нормальных русских серверо в таблице и те что есть для школололо с очевидной любовью к модифицированным серверам. Пинг навешивается огромный.   Ноулайферы это не проблемы игры, проблема игры это наличие блин нормальных серверов. Самых базовых. В режимах de и cs на стандартных картах, с ботами и игроками. Soy un padre de 50 años, probablemente una de las personas más viejas que jugaron este juego. Soy padre soltero de mi hijo, que ahora tiene 14 años. Mi hijo recientemente descargó counter strike  y en menos de una semana, ya había jugado durante más de 20 horas. Esto fue terrible para mí, ya que ya era bastante difícil para mí pasar tiempo con mi hijo, ya que él siempre sale con sus amigos o simplemente mira videos en Tiktok. Así que decidí crear una cuenta de Steam y descargar este juego para ver si podría acercarme mas a mi hijo. Cargué el juego, pero estaba atascado en lo que se suponía que debías hacer. Le pedí ayuda a mi hijo y jugamos juntos toda la tarde. Me encantó porque era el mejor momento que había pasado con mi hijo desde que mi esposa había muerto. Desde entonces, este juego ha acercado a mi hijo y a mí nuevamente y ahora también pasamos tiempo juntos fuera de la casa. Este juego me recordó que hay diversión en todo, y nos ha traído tanto a mí como a mi hijo muchos recuerdos felices.

Soy un padre de 50 años, probablemente una de las personas más viejas que juegan este juego. Soy padre soltero de mi hijo, que ahora tiene 14 años. Mi hijo recientemente descargó Counter-Strike y en menos de una semana, ya había jugado durante más de 20 horas. Esto fue terrible para mí, ya que ya era bastante difícil para mí pasar tiempo con mi hijo, ya que él siempre sale con sus amigos o simplemente mira videos en Tiktok. Así que decidí crear una cuenta de Steam y comprar este juego para ver si podía jugar junto a él. Cargué el juego, hice el tutorial pero estaba atascado en lo que se suponía que debías hacer. Le pedí ayuda a mi hijo y organizó un juego para que yo me uniera. Me encantó porque era el mejor momento que había pasado con mi hijo desde que mi esposa había muerto. Desde entonces, el Counter-Strike ha acercado a mi hijo y a mí nuevamente y ahora también pasamos tiempo juntos fuera de la casa. Este juego me recordó que hay diversión en todo, y nos ha traído tanto a mí como a mi hijo muchos recuerdos felices.

Me encanta este juego, es por mucho mi juego favorito en Steam seguido de Hunt Down The Freeman. este juego es una combinación de un shooter habilidoso con buenas combinaciones de teclas, mecánica y una audiencia madura con una banda sonora afinada e inspiradora que te alienta metódicamente a esforzarte y nunca rendirte. hay mucho contenido para desempacar en este juego y la historia me recuerda algo de la edad oscura, mi parte favorita hasta ahora es donde la horda de duendes sale corriendo del bosque al unísono y persigue al personaje principal. Sin embargo, no deseo estropear la trama, por lo que los insto a que se sumerjan en los juegos para siempre, actualizando la historia, la búsqueda y el contenido. Recién comencé a jugar este juego, pero ya me veo jugando este juego por muchas horas más. ya que hay más para descubrir en este juego que las partes inexploradas del océano terrestre.

Como é bom revisitar certos momentos da nossa história e ver como as coisas eram. Devo ter jogado pra lá de 10.000 horas disso aqui. Seja off-line com bots ou numa lan house da minha região já no fim da vida dela. E vendo agora com um senso crítico mais aguçado, eu vejo o quão medíocre é esse jogo.  Mecanicamente, graficamente e em áudiovisual, Counter strike é uma belíssima bosta. Tudo quadrado, poligonal, sem vida, um projeto praticamente amador e de baixa renda. Se há uma palavra que possa resumir esse jogo seria simplicidade, é tão modesto que tu tampouco consegue mirar sua arma kkkkkkkkkkkk, UM FPS EM QUE NÃO SE USA A MIRA DA ARMA, APENAS HIP FIRE.  Em contrapartida, vendo agora no auge dos 23 anos, era isso que fazia ele mágico, me vejo aqui uma criança que só queria jogar joguinhos de tiro com seu computador de bosta que só rodava pinball e paint. Qual opção recorrer? CS 1.6 pirata com bots. Isso é a essência do jogo. Não é ser bom, não é ser superior mecanicamente, animações e engine, é ser algo sólido, com núcleo de gameplay repetitiva, divertida e que funcione.  Jogávamos isso nas nossas infâncias pois era acessível, faço um parenteses com o futebol: quem em sã consciência preferiria jogar bola ao invés de pilotar um F1? ocorre que um carro de fórmula 1 custa 300 milhões de Euros e um futebolzin maroto sai até por 2 reais uma bolinha de leite.  Para quem foi ontem um grande crítico da fama desses jogos da Valve, hoje após rejogar, eu consigo entender que não é pelo counter strike, tampouco a gameplay diferenciada, mas sim pelo resgate e manutenção das lembranças e bons momentos que tivemos no passado e agora não voltam mais.  Ademais, isso aqui não tem cunho algum de ser uma análise, mas tão somente um relato da minha experiência com CS 1.6, até porque ninguém no auge de 2023 procuraria isso aqui sem conhecê-lo. Se você esteve lá quando ele surgiu, sugiro que tire uns momentos para revisitar os mapas em que nos deleitamos por tantas horas: CS_assault, CS_italy, CS_oilrig, CS_Havana, e tantos outros palcos das nossas históricas batalhas. [h1] Counter-Strike [/h1] Öncelikle bu oyunun bir klasik olduğunu söyleyerek başlamalıyım. Bu incelemeyi tamamen kendi görüşlerime göre yazacağım ama bana katılacağınızı düşünüyorum.  [b] Counter-Strike'ı [/b] bunca yıl ayakta tutan şey modlanabilir olmasıdır. Topluluk sunucuları ile birlikte topluluk hayal gücü ile kendi istediği gibi haritalar tasarlayabiliyor. Her detay değişkenlere sahip ve sunucu sahibi bunu ayarlayabiliyor.  Diğer bir sebep ise oyunda bulunan mekaniklerdir. Bu mekanikler bir yandan yeni harita fikirlerinin oluşmasına da önayak oluyor. Oyunda geliştirildiği oyun motorundan dolayı bir çok açık (mekanik) bulunuyor. Örneğin Surf, Bhop, Sgs, Runboost, Edgebug, Pixel surf gibi. Bu mekanikler bir yandan oyundan sıkılmamanızı ve bağlı kalmanızı sağlıyor. Bu mekaniklerin bize kattığı bir diğer şey ise yeni oyun modları. Bu mekanikleri kullanarak surf, deathrun, jailbreak, 30hp, hns gibi birçok oyun modu türemiştir. Eğer vanilla oyun modlarından sıkıldıysanız modlanmış serverlarda oynayarak yeni bir deneyim kazanabilirsiniz. Oyuncuyu oyuna bağlayan diğer bir şey ise oyunu Öğrendikçe daha da derinleşmesi. Her mekanikte ustalaşmak uzun zaman alıyor Ve bunları oyun içinde kullanmak ta ayrıcalıklı hissettiriyor.  [b] Counter-Strike [/b] oyun dünyasi için de çok önemli bir oyun olduğunu söylemeden geçmek olmaz. Zamanın ilk başarılı FPS (First Person Shooter) oyunlarından biridir. İlk başta bir Half-Life modu olarak çıkış yapan oyun Valve tarafından satın alındıktan sonra bir çok özellik kazanmıştır. 1999 yılında çıkan bir oyuna göre Bize o devirde hiçbir oyunda olmayan deneyimler tattırmıştır. Mekandan Mekana değişen ses ve yankı sistemi, ışıklandırma sistemi, her silaha ait recoil sistemi, Flash bombaları, 5v5 rekabet sistemi vesaire zamanın hiçbir oyununda olmayan yenilikler ile oyun tarihini yeni bir çağa geçirmiştir.  Ben [b] Counter-Strike'ın [/b] ne olursa olsun bitmeyeceğini düşünüyorum. Biliyorsunuz yakın bir zamanda Counter-Strike 2 geliyor ve buna rağmen [b] Counter-Strike'ın [/b] kitlesini koruyacağını düşünüyorum. Malum ülkemizde bilgisayarı olmayan insanlar için güzel bir opsiyon. [b] Counter-Strike'ın [/b] sahip olduğu modlanabilirlik CS:GO ve CS2 de olmadığı için Topluluğun Counter-Strike terk etmeyeceği bir gerçektir. Ne olursa olsun bu oyunun bir kitlesi ve topluluğu olacaktır.  Oynamayana oynattırın, oynayana daha çok oynattırın. Benim için yeri gerçekten çok ayrı. İlk kez Amcamın bilgisayarında Assault deathmatch oynamıştım ve beni kendine bağlamıştı. Zaman İlerledikçe Bhop yapmayı öğrendim. Kendi Bilgisayarımı alınca [b] Counter-Strike'ile [/b] daha fazla vakit geçirmeye başladım. Surf yapmayı öğrendim. Vanilla bhop yapmayı ve Jailbreak sunucularını keşfettim. Counter-Strike benim için dipsiz bir kuyu gibiydi. Her oynayışımda yeni modlar deniyor ve öğrenmeye çalışıyordum. Yeni şeyler öğrenmekte hoşuma gidiyordu.  [b] Counter-Strike'ı [/b] Herkese tavsiye ediyorum.
